title: Google AI Library Project — Five-City Tour
description: A five-city AI training tour bringing generative AI education to underserved communities through public libraries, in partnership with Google and Dream Machine Innovation Labs.
recap: Over the course of the tour, hundreds of community members received hands-on AI training — many encountering these tools for the first time. Each session was designed around accessibility: no prior tech knowledge required, just curiosity and a willingness to learn.
